name: postgres
description: Dedicated PostgreSQL expert plugin covering operations, monitoring, replication and high availability, engineering, infrastructure, cloud platforms, and security across self-managed PostgreSQL, managed cloud services, and common extensions.

interface.shortDescription: Expert help for PostgreSQL operations, tuning, HA, cloud, and security.
interface.longDescription: Postgres provides a routed set of PostgreSQL skills for production database administration, performance diagnostics, SQL and index engineering, replication and high availability, infrastructure, managed cloud platforms, and security hardening.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me administer, tune, secure, or troubleshoot PostgreSQL.
